keyPoints: 11.2: Search engines use indexes to store and retrieve web pages.
11.3: Search engines use algorithms like TF-IDF to rank web pages.
11.4: PageRank is a key factor in search engine ranking.
11.5: The PageRank algorithm was developed by Google founders.
11.6: Search engines use multiple ranking factors, not just PageRank.
11.7: Search engines constantly update their algorithms to improve search results.
